job_location: During training : Belagavi Post training : Belagavi, Bengaluru, Pune
date_of_joining: January 2026 (leaves will be provided for examination)

package_salary.ppo_ctc: Stipend during 6 months Internship : Gross ₹25,000 per month Salary after 6 months Internship : CTC 4.5 – 6 LPA (based on technical competence) Note : In-Hand Compensation - Rs. 30-32k (against the CTC of 4.5 LPA). In case the students are offered more than 4.5L based on their technical competence after completion of the 6-months training, the in-hand salary will increase accordingly.
package_salary.bond: Bond Period - 2.5 years (including 6 months of training) Bond Amount - Rs.3 Lakhs
